baseline.method: Use the recorded simpler comparison path rather than the structural product path.
baseline.name: legacy filename checklist
baseline.result: Check only that the legacy packet filenames exist.

claim.statement: The complete committed fixture passes the Demo Packet v2 validation gate.

missing_evidence.expected: Removing the receipt artifact must make the packet invalid.
missing_evidence.purpose: Require missing evidence to remain explicit rather than converted into a positive claim.

negative.expected: Removing the falsifier must make the packet invalid.
negative.purpose: Prevent an adjacent easier signal from being counted as the primary construct.

falsifier.condition: The v2 validator accepts the committed packet after its falsifier field is removed.
falsifier.evaluation_method: Apply the stated condition to the committed evidence and run log.

non_claims: This fixture does not prove an archive, search, lineage, memory, or agent capability.
This fixture does not establish field prevalence, scale, or performance.

oracle.description: The normative JSON Schema and packet validator independently enumerate the required contract fields.
oracle.method: Validate the committed packet against docs/schemas/demo-packet-v2.schema.json.

primary_construct.statement: The committed fixture demonstrates the complete Demo Packet v2 directory and epistemic shape.

receipts.description: Committed evidence rows and references for this packet.
The committed prompt that states the packet claim before execution.

results.summary: The fixture satisfies the complete Demo Packet v2 contract.

title: Demo Packet contract fixture
